case_title: SAN FRANCISCO HOUSING AUTHORITY VS. DALANA KELLY ET AL

docket_entries.description: REQUEST FOR CLERK'S JUDGMENT BY DEFAULT, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS AS TO DEFENDANT KELLY, DALANA

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 1169 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF SAN FRANCISCO HOUSING AUTHORITY RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT KELLY, DALANA THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 113 BROOKDALE AVENUE SAN FRANCISCO, CA 94134; COUTNY OF SAN FRANCISCO, LEASE FORFEITED, **APPLIES TO ALL UNNAMED/UNKNOWN OCCUPANTS.**

SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT, PREJUDGMENT CLAIM OF RIGHT OF POSSESSION, PROOF OF SERVICE ONLY, FILED BY PLAINTIFF SAN FRANCISCO HOUSING AUTHORITY SERVED NOV-17-2016, POSTING AND MAILING AS TO DEFENDANT KELLY, DALANA
